## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff lint + format + full test suite)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (hermetic: no network, sound device, or real config)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`, or docstrings) where behaviour changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` "Unreleased" section updated
- [ ] Public API / config changes are backwards-compatible (added, not repurposed)
